home.subtitle: Free writing multiverse
home.emptyTagline: Your first space is a blank one. Pick a template to get started, or start from nothing.
home.tagline: A clutter-free space for long-form writing — fiction, research, essays, journals.
home.syncOffChip: sync/backups not enabled · data can be lost
home.syncOnBody: Your work syncs to the “{{folder}}” folder on this device.
home.warningBody: No data sync. Everything lives in your browser and clearing its cache loses your work. You can enable sync to a local folder in Universal settings → Sync.

about.title: about
about.paragraph1: This is for the writer who keeps starting over.  The one who opens a new document, types three sentences (or none), then spends 40mins  adjusting the font. The one whose best ideas arrive at 2am and get distracted. The one with fourteen tabs, six notebooks, and a draft that hasn't moved in a month.
about.paragraph2After: . I have ADHD, Autism, probably other -isms hasn't been diagnosed yet. I need something that understands my chaotic but wonderful brain. Somewhere to dump everything before it disappears (or start writing). The fragments, the half-thoughts, the 3am connections. All of it, in one place.
about.paragraph3: So I built this space for us. I hope it gives your dopamine rush just as much it give me to build this.
about.paragraph4Before: One more thing... I believe in tech for good & I hate advertsing. So, this will always be advert free and FREE for non-commercial use. You can fork it modify it as you like under
about.statusValueRest: — there is no data sync. All data is saved in IndexedDB in your local browser. If you clear your browser cache, your work will be lost.
about.feedbackBefore: I am still building this and I have alot ideas
about.feedbackAfter: . I'd love to hear what works, what doesn't, and what you wish existed. Feedback is welcome.

language.title: Language
language.subtitle: Choose the language for the interface and Help Center articles. Missing translations fall back to English.
language.label: Interface language
language.hint: Changes apply instantly and are saved in this browser.
language.machineTranslationNotice: Translations other than English are produced automatically. Apologies for any errors — please send feedback so we can correct them.

editor.title: Editor
editor.subtitle: Toolbar and writing affordances. Markdown shortcuts (#, >, -, **) keep working regardless of these settings.
editor.floatingToolbarHint: Appears on highlight or right-click in write mode.
editor.rightClickHint: Switch between the floating toolbar and the browser's native context menu.
editor.rightClickTooltip: Use the native context menu on right-click instead of the floating toolbar. The toolbar will still appear on highlight-select.
editor.inlineTogglesHint: Bold and italic buttons inside the floating toolbar.
editor.inlineTogglesTooltip: Hide the B and I buttons from the floating toolbar. Markdown shortcuts (**, _) keep working.
editor.listDepthHint: How deep bullet and numbered lists can nest.
editor.listDepthTooltip: Raise or lower the cap on list nesting. Currently fixed at 2 levels.
editor.templateDefaultsTooltip: Let each template (fiction, journal, technical…) choose its own formatting subset.

docInspector.title: Doc inspector
docInspector.subtitle: Choose which fields appear in the document inspector. Each can be turned off universally and overridden per space.
docInspector.statusHint: Show the document status and lock completed documents from editing.
docInspector.wordLimitHint: Show a word-count limit you can set per document.
docInspector.charLimitHint: Show a character-count limit you can set per document.
docInspector.dueDateHint: Show a deadline you can set per document.
docInspector.highlightHint: Mark any text beyond the limit in the editor.
docInspector.statusStagesHint: Choose which stages appear in the status picker.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.subtitle: Tune the interface for comfort and assistive technology. Every option starts at the current experience — nothing changes until you choose it.

theme.label: Theme & contrast
theme.hint: High-contrast themes meet the WCAG AAA contrast standard.

textSize.label: Text size
textSize.hint: Scale the reading and writing surface.

lineSpacing.label: Line spacing
lineSpacing.hint: Add breathing room between lines of prose.

linkUnderline.label: Always underline links
linkUnderline.hint: Show underlines so links don't rely on colour alone.

focus.label: Enhanced focus indicator
focus.hint: Use a thicker, higher-contrast outline on focus.

reset.label: Reset to defaults
reset.hint: Restore motion, text size, line spacing, links, and focus to their defaults. Your theme is unchanged.

general.title: General
general.subtitle: How LIpsum Writer shows up by default. None of this is destructive.
general.comingSoonBody: Compact density, reduce motion, keyboard hint visibility, and what view opens at startup.
general.compactDensityHint: Tighter rows in lists, tighter padding everywhere.
general.keyboardHintsHint: Display ⌘-key shortcuts in tooltips and the corner of buttons.
general.startupHint: What you see when you launch the app.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.subtitle: Colour, type, density. The mood you want this thing to set.
appearance.comingSoonBody: Curated theme palettes, accent colour, and density. Today's theme switch lives in the world rail's quick settings.
appearance.themeHint: Three curated palettes. They tune everything — block colours, hairlines, even the grain.
appearance.accentHint: Used for hover, focus, active editing ring.

templates.title: Templates
templates.subtitle: Reusable scaffolds for new spaces and docs.
templates.comingSoonBody: Author your own templates with sections, default doc names, and prose stubs.

palettes.title: Highlight palettes
palettes.subtitle: Five-slot palettes per space — name and tune each colour.
palettes.comingSoonBody: Edit, save, and switch named highlight palettes (Evidence, To revise, Reference…) across spaces.

citations.title: Citation style
citations.subtitle: Default citation style across spaces.
citations.comingSoonBody: Pick a universal style (Chicago, APA, MLA…) with per-space overrides.
citations.styleHint: Used when inserting a new citation. Per-space overrides land later.

annotation.title: Annotations
annotation.subtitle: Margin notes and inline annotations.
annotation.comingSoonBody: Annotation kinds, visibility defaults, and export behaviour.
annotation.showMarginHint: Annotations float in the right gutter when there's room.
annotation.showInlineHint: Annotation colour bleeds onto the underlying prose.
annotation.exportHint: Annotations are written out alongside the document body.

export.title: Export / import
export.subtitle: Move data in and out of LIpsum Writer.
export.comingSoonBody: Bulk export to .zip, import from another LIpsum bundle or Markdown directory.
export.formatHint: Per-doc and per-space exports use the same default.
export.importHint: Bring in another LIpsum bundle or a directory of Markdown files.
export.importSpaceHint: Bring a space into this browser from a Writer archive (.zip) — a snapshot download or a folder-sync export from another device.
export.comingSoonHint: Bulk export and import from Markdown folders or Obsidian vaults.

data.title: Your data
data.subtitle: Where your work lives and how much room it takes.
data.comingSoonBody: IndexedDB usage, storage estimate, and a one-click full wipe.
data.wipeHint: Removes every space, doc, and snapshot from this browser. There is no undo.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Build info and links.
about.comingSoonBody: See the /about page for the story; this tab will host build info, license, and changelog.

account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Sign-in, sync across devices, and shared workspaces.
account.comingSoonBody: Cloud sync is unavailable today — Lotem is local-only. Account, sign-in, and shared workspaces land when sync ships.
account.signedOutHint: Cloud sync is not available yet. This is here to show the design.
account.syncHint: Once you sign in, your spaces will replicate to other devices.

typography.title: Typography
typography.subtitle: Defaults across all worlds. Individual worlds may override.
typography.comingSoonBody: Pick the prose font, UI font, default reading size, line height, and measure for new worlds.

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.subtitle: Keyboard bindings for navigation, formatting, and modes.
shortcuts.comingSoonBody: Rebindable shortcuts for write/read/split, focus mode, and the formatting toolbar.

backups.title: Backups
backups.subtitle: Export, restore, and snapshot your local data.
backups.comingSoonBody: Scheduled local snapshots, manual export to .zip, and restore from a previous backup.

sync.title: Sync
sync.subtitle: Push your spaces to a folder you choose. Point it at a Google Drive, Dropbox, or iCloud folder to sync across devices.
sync.unsupportedBody: Folder sync needs the File System Access API, available in Chrome, Edge, and other Chromium browsers on desktop. Switch to a supported browser to use it.
sync.folderHint: Each sync writes a Markdown .zip per space here, keeping the last 5 plus a latest.zip. Sync is separate from Backups.
sync.intervalHint: How often spaces sync automatically while the app is open and the folder is connected. Each space can override this default.
sync.pushOnlyHint: Push-only for now — this writes your local data to the folder. Pulling changes back lands later.
sync.reconnectHint: Sync is paused — the browser needs folder permission again for this session. Reconnect to resume manual and auto-sync.

docInspector.title: Doc inspector
docInspector.subtitle: Override the universal inspector settings for this space.

palette.title: Highlight palette
palette.subtitle: Five named, tunable highlight colours for this space.
palette.comingSoonBody: Rename, retint, and reorder this space's highlight slots.

export.title: Export
export.subtitle: Move this space's content into another tool.
export.comingSoonBody: Export to Markdown .zip (today via Backups), LaTeX, HTML, or PDF — all in one place.
export.formatHint: Markdown ships first; the rest follow.

general.title: General
general.subtitle: Identifying details for this space. Changes apply immediately and sync across views.
general.nameHint: Shown in the sidebar header and the space rail tooltip.
general.tagHint: A short code (2–4 characters) shown on the space rail tile.

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.subtitle: Control how this space is shared.
sharing.comingSoonBody: Per-space visibility and shared links. Lands when cloud sync ships.
sharing.linkHint: Read-only by default. Editing privileges follow Members.

template.title: Template
template.subtitle: The structural template this space was created with.
template.comingSoonBody: Changing a space's template after creation isn't supported yet. Lands once we can migrate sections and docs safely.
template.changeHint: Reflows existing sections and docs to the new template.

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: Co-writers and reviewers with access to this space.
members.comingSoonBody: Invite collaborators, manage roles, and review changes. Lands with cloud sync.
members.inviteHint: We'll send them a link to join this space.

backups.title: Backups
backups.subtitle: Snapshot this space as a .zip you can download, keep, and restore from.
backups.retentionHint: Keeping the {{count}} most recent snapshots — older ones are removed automatically.
backups.empty: No snapshots yet — create one with + snapshot now.
backups.deleteConfirm: Delete this snapshot? This cannot be undone.
backups.restoreUnavailable: This snapshot predates restore support — it can only be downloaded.
backups.restoreDialogBody: The current content of this space will be replaced with the snapshot. A snapshot of the current state is saved first, so you can undo this restore.
backups.fileRestoreBody: Import it via Universal settings → Export / import — it comes back as a new space, leaving this one untouched.

sync.title: Sync
sync.subtitle: Push this space to the connected folder, manually or on a schedule. Sync is separate from Backups.
sync.folderHint: Connect a folder in Universal settings → Sync. The same folder is used for every space.
sync.intervalHint: How often this space syncs automatically. Choose Default to follow the universal auto-sync setting.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.subtitle: Irreversible actions. Read carefully before continuing.
danger.deleteCardBody: Permanently removes this space along with every document, section, brain-space note, annotation, citation, and connection. This cannot be undone.
danger.dialogBody: This permanently removes the space and all its contents. This cannot be undone.

templates.syncTooltip: Cloud sync is unavailable — this app is local-only for now.

dump.title: Brain space
dump.mobileWarning: Brain space works best on a larger screen.
dump.mobileNote: The canvas needs a mouse or trackpad.

canvas.pendingHint: shift-click another note to connect · esc to cancel

drawer.title: Note details
drawer.description: Edit the selected note and manage its connections.
drawer.pictureLimitHint: limit of {{count}} reached — remove one to add another.
drawer.connectionsEmpty: shift-click another note on the canvas to connect.

split.title: Split view
split.mobileWarning: Split view needs a larger screen.
split.mobileNote: Open this document in Write mode instead.
split.pickDoc: Pick a document from the dropdown above.

citationsDrawer.title: Citations
citationsDrawer.description: Search, import, and export citations for this space.

citations.title: Citations
citations.importHint: import a .bib or add one manually.

edit.duplicateKey: Tag "{{key}}" is already used in this space.
edit.confirmDeleteUsed: This citation is used {{count}}× in your documents. Delete anyway?
edit.confirmDeleteSingle: Delete citation "{{key}}"? This cannot be undone.

bulk.confirmDelete: Delete {{count}} citation(s)? This cannot be undone.

row.selectAllAria: Select all citations on this page
